issues.title: [Epic · Week 2] Web foundation and static catalog
issues.outcome: Complete the web foundation and static catalog outcome without pulling later platform work into the current gate.
scope: Close the phase only with evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Every child issue has a clear owner, milestone, and acceptance criteria.
Blocked work is represented using issue dependencies.
The phase gate has explicit evidence.
definitionOfDone: Acceptance criteria are verified.
Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 2 · Engineering] One-command quality gate for Rsbuild, static data, tests, and production build
issues.outcome: Provide one reproducible command and CI job that validates the web MVP and preserved Rust workspace.
scope: Formatting, linting, type checking, unit tests, schema/content validation, Rust checks, production build, and smoke tests.
Keep generated artifacts out of source control unless explicitly reviewed.
acceptanceCriteria: A clean checkout passes the documented command.
CI uses least privilege and pinned actions.
The public web build excludes hidden runtime routes and debug fixtures.
Failures are actionable.
definitionOfDone: Acceptance criteria are verified.
Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 2 · Frontend] Build app shell, routing, theme, settings, and resilient route states
issues.outcome: Replace the single debug screen with the public wiki shell and approved route structure.
scope: Header, footer, navigation, skip link, route layout, 404, error boundary, loading and offline states.
Hide runtime/viewer surfaces from public navigation and bundle entry points where practical.
acceptanceCriteria: All MVP routes resolve to intentional states.
Keyboard navigation and focus order are documented and tested.
Theme switching avoids flash and respects system preference.
Direct navigation works on GitHub Pages using the selected routing strategy.
definitionOfDone: Acceptance criteria are verified.
Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 2 · Frontend] Migrate the web app from Vite to Rsbuild/Rspack
issues.outcome: Move the public web build to Rsbuild/Rspack while preserving React, TypeScript, tests, and the isolated Rust/WASM workspace.
scope: Measure baseline build output and dev startup.
acceptanceCriteria: Development, test, and production commands pass.
GitHub Pages base path is configurable.
No Vite-only import remains in the public web path.
Bundle report is captured.
definitionOfDone: Acceptance criteria are verified.
Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 2 · UX] Implement accessible Hikari-light and Tairitsu-dark design foundations
issues.outcome: Translate the approved original visual direction into small reusable Tailwind CSS v4 tokens and primitives.
scope: Theme tokens, typography, spacing, borders, polygon accents, focus styles, image frames, cards, tables, filters, and content prose.
Document component API and misuse cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Both themes meet contrast targets.
Core primitives render in a documented showcase.
Reduced motion and high zoom remain usable.
No copyrighted UI asset is copied.
definitionOfDone: Acceptance criteria are verified.
Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 2 · Data] Implement validated static catalog loading, indexes, and failure states
issues.outcome: Load a versioned catalog into the browser through generated, typed, validated static artifacts.
scope: Corrupt, missing, stale, and unsupported-version states.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalid data fails CI.
Runtime code receives typed records.
Catalog version is visible in support diagnostics.
No network database is required.
definitionOfDone: Acceptance criteria are verified.
Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 2 · Assets] Build licensed image manifest and responsive optimization pipeline
issues.outcome: Make every published partner, character, jacket, and decorative image traceable and optimized.
scope: Asset manifest and permission evidence convention.
acceptanceCriteria: Build fails for an asset without an approved record.
Generated images stay within defined size budgets.
Source originals are handled according to permission terms.
Pages reserve dimensions to avoid layout shift.
definitionOfDone: Acceptance criteria are verified.
Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.
